provider: HKUST 2025/26 BSc in Global China Studies Major Requirements
note: The official PDF is headed 2026-27 requirements for the 2025-26 intake. This supplement records all 88 unique explicit course codes across the common Major Required courses, the Integrated Humanities and Social Science Track, the Social Science Track, and the seven Research Options. Repeated codes are stored once with every published role retained in the group text. The open HUMA/SOSC/SHSS Electives pool, Any ECON courses in the Applied Economics Research Option, and Any SOSC courses in the Social Science Track are not expanded into fabricated closed lists. The six intake-specific deleted courses remain because the official PDF explicitly lists them, with their published last-offered years retained. Track choice, capstone alternatives, Research Option eligibility and thesis-focus conditions, level and area minima, course double-counting restrictions, and open subject pools require manual review; this union course list must not be presented as a graduation-completion decision. University Common Core requirements are outside this Programme-local supplement.
